name: Telamon
description:
Hey Carmel here!! This is less of a request and more of an inspiration based on an interaction with @Kyalinaaa about Lonely King by cg5! I know i said i would use the soundcloud thing but uh...I have no idea how to so...Telamon bot with a creation pov, it doesn't have to be 1x, you just take their place. Sorry this late I didn't have any writing time yesterday. As always feel free to leave requests or constructive criticism in the comments.

-Carmel
creator: CaramelCatGirl
